# Priyansh Singh Purawat — Full Stack Developer (Full Profile)

> Extended profile for AI crawlers and language models. Plain-text markdown so LLMs can ingest the full content without parsing JavaScript.

## About

Priyansh Singh Purawat is a full-stack developer based in Jaipur, India, and a current Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) student. He builds production-grade web applications across the entire MERN stack — MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js — with a focus on responsive interfaces, clean component architecture, and end-to-end shipping (from database schema to deployed UI).

He is available for freelance projects, internships, and full-time roles in full-stack web development.

## Core Expertise

### Frontend
- React (hooks, suspense, modern patterns)
- Next.js and TanStack Start (SSR, file-based routing)
- TypeScript for type-safe applications
- Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling
- Framer Motion for smooth animations and transitions
- Responsive, mobile-first design
- Accessibility (semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard navigation, color contrast)

### Backend
- Node.js with Express.js
- REST API design and versioning
- JWT-based authentication and authorization
- Server-side input validation
- Error handling and structured logging

### Database
- MongoDB with Mongoose ODM
- PostgreSQL fundamentals
- Schema design, indexing basics, relational and document modeling

### Tooling & DevOps
- Git and GitHub workflows (branches, PRs, code review)
- Deployment on Vercel
- Vite, npm, bun
- Environment and secret management

## Selected Projects

### Full Stack E-Commerce (In Progress)
A complete end-to-end e-commerce platform.
- Stack: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT, payment integration
- Features: user auth, product catalog, cart, checkout, order history
- Repo: https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat

### Aspect Ratio Calculator
A single-page responsive utility for screen resolution and aspect ratio conversion. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to showcase fundamentals.
- Repo: https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat

### Notes Taking App
A clean vanilla-JS notes application with localStorage persistence. Create, save, edit, and delete notes — all stored locally in the browser.
- Live: https://priyanshsinghpurawat.github.io/Notes-APP/
- Repo: https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat

### Exchange Rate App
A real-time currency converter that fetches live exchange-rate data and converts between currencies. Focused on async data fetching and responsive layout.
- Live: https://priyanshsinghpurawat.github.io/Exchange-Rate/
- Repo: https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat

## Education
- Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) — Jaipur, India (current student)

## Location & Availability
- Based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Open to remote work worldwide and on-site roles in India
- Available for: freelance projects, internships, full-time roles
